entry.title: 新洲工作
entry.content:
Mr ZHONG is a newly arrived migrant, he has recently found a new job opportunity. Before accepting the new job, he goes to NSW Office of Industrial Relations to seek further information about working in NSW. Ms Jones, an IR officer meets Mr ZHONG at her office.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1我最近在找工作。有一个雇主要求我去面试，在我去之前，我想咨询您几个问题。I’ve been looking for jobs recently. One employer asked me to attend an interview. But before I go, I would like to ask you a few questions.
M1Congratulations！I will try to provide you with all the information that you might need. Before you start work you need to know the conditions you will be working and exactly what you will be expected to do in the role. Your employer should give you this information in a letter of offer.54
E2这封聘用书都具体都应该包含那些内容呢？我知道的有，我的工资，工作时间，我的职责等等。 但是我希望聘用书里面能包括公司的政策，因为它能反映用人单位的雇佣理念。我还希聘用书能列出一些对我有益处的职工培训项目。What exactly should be included in the letter of offer? I only know there should be my salary, working hours and duties. But I hope it also includes company’s policies which normally reflect their employment philosophies, as well as some useful training programs that I may find beneficial.
M2You are right. The letter of offer should include the employer’s name and contact details, your duties, salary, working hours, your employment conditions and whether you are to be employed as a casual, full-time or part-time employee.37
E3原来有这么多的细节信息呀。我本来想着特别简单， 就是我上班，雇主给钱。却不知道还有这么多不同的工作形式。Oh so there is actually that much detailed information. I thought it would be just as simple as I work and get paid. But I didn’t know there are so many different types of jobs.
M3Please remember to ask your employer what employment you will be working under and whether you are covered by a state or federal award.24
E4我明白了，每个细节都必须搞清楚。如果雇主给我书面聘用书，我应该收到后立刻签署相关的文件吗？I see. I need to go through every detail. If the employer sends me an offer in writing, should I sign those documents as soon as they are provided?
M4As part of the process of accepting a new job, you may be asked to sign a document agreeing to particular working conditions. This could be called a contract or an agreement. If this happens, make sure you read it very carefully first. Don’t feel pressured to sign straight away, especially if it doesn’t suit you.56
E5如果雇主没有给我书面的聘用书，我应该怎么办？我应该和他要吗？有的雇主嫌麻烦，不愿意出书面的聘用书。What should I do if the employer is reluctant to present me with a written offer Should I ask for it? Some employers simply can’t be bothered to issue an offer letter.
M5A verbal agreement is also a legal contract. One of the best things you can do is to note down everything the employer has told you about the job and your working conditions. Even though you have written it yourself, this can be used as evidence if there is any future dispute about your pay or conditions.57
E6我听说这边主要分两种工人，一种是合同制工人，一种是雇佣制工人。 而且雇员有全职工作， 半职工作， 还有临时工？如果雇主要求我做免费试工，我该怎么办？I heard that there are two types of workers, under which I can either work as a contractor or employee and that I can work full time, part time or casually. What if they ask me to do an unpaid trial?
M6Yes, you are right. It is important for all workers to know whether they are employees or contractors. Workers can be employed on a full-time, part-time or casual basis. It is against the law for prospective employers to make you do an unpaid work trial, even if it is just for a few hours.54

entry.title: 煤气泄漏
entry.content:
his is a dialogue between a woman discussing some problems regarding her living arrangements with a case manager at the Department of Family and Community Services.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good afternoon. How is everything going? You moved into the unit in Murray St almost three months ago now. Have you settled in all right?25
M1是这样的，其实还没有。有些问题，我得跟你反映一下。Well, no actually, there are a few problems I need to talk to you about.
E2Oh, really? I’m surprised to hear that. You were so pleased when you were able to get that unit, because it’s in such a convenient location for you. What’s the matter?31
M2嗯，还是存在不少问题的。但主要让我担心的是，厨房里好像总是弥漫着一 股让人头晕的煤气味。我恐怕是有煤气泄漏。Well, there are a few things…but my main concern is that there seems to always be a faint smell of gas in the kitchen, and I’m worried that there might be a leak.
E3Oh! Well yes, if that’s the case, you’re quite right, it does need to be fixed immediately. I’ll ring the gas company right now. Will you be home for the rest of the afternoon?34
M3这里结束之后，三点钟我就得到学校去接我的儿子放学。然后我们就直接回 家了。一般三点半之前就能到家。Well, after I leave here I have to pick up my son from school at 3 o’clock, but then we’ll be going straight home. We usually get home before 3.30.
E4Good. When it’s a suspected leak, they usually get someone to come and investigate it within a couple of hours. But you’ll need to be there to let them in.30
M4噢，对啊，我知道。那没有关系。如果能解决这个问题，我就放心多了。现 在我可不可以再反应一下其他的问题？Oh yes, I understand. That will be fine. It will be a great relief to have that fixed. Is it all right if I mention the other problems now?
E5Of course, go ahead.4
M5嗯，是关于 6 号房的那家人，就住在我们楼上。他们太吵了。夜里，我试过 让他们把电视机的声音关小一点，但从来都没有用。我们根本睡不了觉！Well, it’s about the people in unit 6, directly above us. They’re very noisy. I tried asking them to turn the TV down at night, but it hasn’t helped. We can’t get any sleep!
E6Ah, yes, some of the other tenants have complained about them too. I’ll send them a warning letter. If they don’t keep the noise down, let us know and we’ll follow it up.33
M6那就麻烦你了，谢谢。Please do. Thank you!

entry.title: 为女贷款
entry.content:
Mrs. Shan is speaking to a Legal Aid officer about helping her daughter financially.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning, Mrs. Shan. Sorry to have kept you waiting. The receptionist wasn’t very specific when she mentioned what you’re here for today. Am I correct in saying that it has something to do with taking out a loan?39
M1是的，是这样的。我的女儿最近和女婿在 Burwood 买了一套房子，借了不 少钱。// 前不久她和我打电话时说她失业了， 女婿一个人打工还房贷还 要养家很辛苦。我想用我在 Kensington 的房子抵押贷款，来帮他们一把。Yes, you’re right. My daughter and her husband bought a property in Burwood recently. They borrowed a lot of money for that.// She called me not long ago, saying she has just lost her job, so her husband is now struggling to make the loan repayments and support the family all by himself. In order to help them out, I want to use my property in Kensington to get a mortgage.
E2I understand that it’s very difficult to watch your daughter struggle financially, but you also need to protect your own interests and make sure that whatever is asked of you is realistic. With that in mind, how would you describe your own financial situation?44
M2我的经济状况？一般吧。退休以后我就靠养老金生活，省点用基本能够凑 合。不过 Kensington 的房子是我自己的，房贷也已经还清。我女儿说如果 现在拿去抵押贷款的话可以借到一笔不小的数目。My financial situation? It’s pretty average. I’ve been living off the pension since retiring. I have no problem getting by if I save a bit of money. But the property in Kensington is mine and the mortgage has been paid off. My daughter said that if I use it to get a mortgage I would be able to borrow a lot of money.
E3I think I am getting to understand the whole story. Are you saying that, your daughter was the one who suggested the loan, is that correct?26
M3是的，虽然她和她丈夫的个人信誉评价都很好，但由于房贷的关系，各大 银行都不愿意再借钱给他们，所以不得不求我帮忙。Yes. She and her husband both have very good creditworthiness, but no bank wants to lend them money due to their current mortgage. So they had to turn to me for help.
E4Whilst I can empathise with your situation, I would still like to highlight that you will be the one who bears most of the risk.25
M4我明白，但是最近房价涨得这么厉害，如果银行因为他们还不起房贷而回 收他们的房子，以后再要买房就更困难了。I know, but the housing prices are soaring. It would be difficult for them to buy another property in the future, if the bank took back their house away just because they couldn’t afford the loan.
E5But if you take out a loan to help your daughter, you will be relying on her to make the repayments, as your pension is only enough for you to get by. If she can’t pay, you might lose your house.41
M5可是她毕竟是我唯一的女儿， 我不帮她谁帮她呢？我这次来也是她的提 议，因为我们都想不出更好的办法。您对此有什么建议吗？或许我应该把 房子的产权转一部分给她？But she is my only daughter. If I don’t help her, who else will? Coming to see you was also her suggestion, as neither of us could come up with a better idea. What’s your advice? Should I transfer part of my property title to her?
E6That would still carry the same risk as if you take out the loan yourself. You can consider taking out a reverse mortgage, where you only pay back the loan when you die or sell your home. But that might leave too little equity in the property to pay for your health care or to leave as an inheritance to your daughter.62
M6反向抵押贷款？我从没听说过。麻烦您给我一些关于这种贷款的信息，我 得回家和我女儿讨论一下。A reverse mortgage? I have never heard of it. Could you please give me more information about this kind of loan? I’d like to discuss it with my daughter when I get home.

entry.title: 花粉病症
entry.content:
Mr. Lee (L), a Mandarin speaking patient, is speaking to his GP (G) about his flu-like symptoms.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1醫生，我覺得好难受呀。Hello doctor. I am not feeling very well.
M1Good morning Mr. Lee. You actually don’t look very good. I can see that you have blood-shot eyes and your face is swelling.23
E2我近來一直打喷嚏、流鼻涕。起初我以为是流感，所以就去买了些治流感的药片。但吃了药之后却并没有好转。Recently, I’ve been sneezing a lot and have had a runny nose. I initially thought that it was the flu, so I went to buy some flu tablets. But I didn’t get any better after taking the medication.
M2Right, it doesn’t look like a cold or the flu to me. While I’m taking your temperature, could you please tell me whether you have itchy or watery eyes?29
E3有呀。白天我的眼睛感觉更难受。除此之外，我胃口不错，睡眠也没问题。并无大碍。医生，我这是怎么了？我可真是受不了了。Yes, I do. My eyes get worse during the day. Other than this, I have a good appetite and can sleep well. There’s nothing major. Doctor, what is my problem? I really can’t stand this anymore.
M3I see. What you have now is an allergy that is commonly known as ‘hay fever’. It is triggered by an allergic reaction to pollen in the air, usually in spring and summer.33
E4哦，是这样。难怪我那天在后院修割草坪之后，觉得更严重了。这病严重吗？Oh, I see. No wonder I felt worse the other day after I mowed the grass in the backyard. Is this a very serious illness?
M4Mr. Lee, don’t worry. I can assure you that your condition is not unique. Hay fever is very common in Australia – about 3.2 million Australians suffer from chronic hay fever.30
E5你可不可以给我开点药呢？我想尽快康复。尽管你说了这病不要紧，可我还是觉得我很难集中精神。Can you give me some medicine? I want to recover from this as soon as possible. Even though you just mentioned that this is not a serious problem, I find it very hard to concentrate.
M5You don’t need any prescription for the medication. You can simply go to any chemist and buy some nasal spray or tablets over the counter to alleviate your symptoms.29
E6醫生，那你能否给我一些如何预防花粉症的信息呢？我不想再得这种病了。Doctor, could you please give me some information on preventing hay fever? I don’t want to suffer from this anymore.
M6Sure, there are some leaflets on preventing hay fever in the reception. You can take a copy with you when you leave.22

entry.title: 蛀牙手术
entry.content:
This is a dialogue between a general dentist Mr Bryant and a patient, Ms Gao, regarding her toothache caused by horizontal tooth impaction.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1Good morning, Ms Gao. What brings you here today?9
M1医生，早上好，我牙齿的 X 光的结果出来了吗? 上次检查，您说我是长智齿 了。我每天都牙疼得吃不下、睡不香，生活一团糟。Good morning, doctor. Have you received my dental X-ray results? Last time, you told me that I have a wisdom tooth coming out. I cannot eat or sleep well due to the pain. My life is just a mess!
E2I have examined your X-ray report, I can see that you do have one wisdom tooth at the back left corner of your mouth. It seems that it is causing the gum around the tooth to be infected, and adjacent teeth to decay also. We have to treat this matter seriously, otherwise you might end up with severe complications.59
M2您指的是哪些并发症？您认为我现在的牙周炎是由长智齿引起的么 ? 我 近来已经格外注意保持口腔卫生了，但似乎也没什么帮助。What kind of complications are you referring to? Do you think my current periodontitis was caused by this? I have been paying particular attention to keeping my mouth clean lately but it seems it hasn’t been much help.
E3The most common complications include erosion cavities, infections, crowding and cysts. Your wisdom tooth has stalled halfway, which makes brushing and flossing of it extremely difficult. Food and bacteria have built up around the neighbouring molars, causing decay and gum infection. I can imagine the enormous pain you are experiencing.50
M3是这样， 那麻烦您再给我开点抗生素和止痛药吧！上次的药， 我都已经用完 了。我每天都疼得受不了，而且越来越严重。怎么才能彻底让它不痛呢？That’s true. I have finished all the antibiotics and pain killers that you prescribed for me last time. Could you give me some more? This pain is unbearable and worsening each day. How can I completely get rid of this pain?
E4Unfortunately, although mouth infections such as periodontitis caused by wisdom teeth can be treated with antibiotics, the infection will re-occur unless the wisdom teeth are removed.26
M4一定要拔吗？虽然我身边的很多朋友都拔了，但我听说拔牙也可能引发许多后 期的问题，比如说牙齿渗血、出血，牙槽干燥，甚至神经损伤。如果真的是这 样，那听起来可太吓人了。Do I have to? Many of my friends have had their wisdom teeth extracted, but I was told that it could cause many post-extraction problems. For example, bleeding and oozing, dry sockets or even nerve injury. It sounds so terrible if that is true.
E5But I’m afraid it is the best option. As you can see from the X-ray, the emerging tooth is angled 90 degrees sideways, and growing into the roots of the second molar, which is generally known as horizontal tooth impaction. We will have to remove it.46
M5看来是别无选择了。你看我的下牙是不是都被挤歪了？我是不是还要戴牙套？ 我小的时候戴过好几年，但是总被人嘲笑，我可不想再经历一次了。那手术时 会不会很疼？It seems I have no other choice. Have you noticed that my lower teeth are crooked? Do you think I need to get braces? I wore them for years when I was little, and I was often laughed at because of that. I don’t want to go there again. Will I suffer a lot of pain in the surgery?
E6You will be under local anaesthesia during the surgery so you won’t feel any pain during the procedure. We can talk about orthodontic treatment after the surgery.27
M6那我就照您说的做吧。请您给我安排个手术时间。谢谢。Ok, then I will follow your instructions. Please schedule a time for my surgery. Thank you.

entry.title: 养老咨询
entry.content:
Mrs Hong, a mandarin speaking woman is consulting with Thomas, the manager of an aged care centre.
IDOriginalTranslated
E1你好！谢谢你抽出时间来跟我面谈。我今天来是想要了解一下你们这个养老院的一些大致情况。Hello, thank you for taking the time to see me. I’m here today to get some general information about your aged care centre.
M1Good morning! Thank you very much for showing your interest in our centre. Please have a seat. My name is Thomas, I’m more than happy to help you.28
E2是这样的。我已经 75 岁了。我打算从家里搬出来，因为我的儿子和儿媳妇不再愿意和我住在一起了，说是没有隐私了。我想了解一下你们这里不同房间的价格。Well, I’m 75 and I am planning to move out of my home, because my son and his wife don’t like living with me anymore. They said they need more privacy. I’d like to know the rates for different types of rooms here?
M2Sure. Actually it is a very wise decision to choose us as we have various types of rooms which come with a variety of rates so you can choose the one that best suits your needs. The most popular one is a studio.43
E3哦，我了解了。那么你们这里通常都是住着什么样的人呢？我希望我的左邻右舍都是很好心又乐于助人的人。人老了，就图个心情好，要是遇到一些不好的邻居，那就麻烦了。Oh, I see. So generally speaking, what kind of people are living here? I ‘d like to have some kind and warm-hearted neighbours. When you’re old, being happy is all one cares about. If my neighbours happen to be unfriendly, that would cause trouble.
M3Don’t worry. Our centre has been among the top ten aged care centres for five years in a row, and we are as careful in choosing our members as they are in choosing us. If there is any dispute, you can always refer it to our dispute mediation committee to have it solved fairly.54
E4听起来还不错，你们还有专门的调解委员会。那么我想问问你们对客户在健康方面的要求有什么特别设计的一些设施吗？Sounds great! So you have this particular mediation committee here. Also I’d like to know, do you have any specially designed facilities and support for members with special health needs?
M4Oh yes, we take our members’ health issues into consideration. We have a carer team to help people who have Alzheimer’s and dementia, and all the rooms are specifically designed for seniors, and include things such as automatic lighting systems and heating systems. Our members’ specific health requirements are seen as very important to us.55
E5我有健忘症，还有高血压，而且你也看到了，我是用轮椅的。你们这里有针对我这样情况的设施和护理人员吗？I have amnesia and hypertension. And as you can tell, I am a wheel chair user.Do you have any facilities or carers to help people in my kind of situation?
M5Amnesia and hypertension are common among seniors, and when we first designed this centre, we took this into consideration. We have a team of 16 experienced nurses to provide professional care. Also, our rooms are all purpose built, which means they are all wheel-chair accessible.45
E6这很好。那么关于心理方面，你们有相关的专业人员吗？你知道，老年人很容易感到孤单，被社会隔离等，这些负面的心理倾向往往会引发一些生理上的问题。That’s good. What about the mental health services? Do you have any professionals? You know seniors often feel lonely and socially isolated. These negative psychological tendencies often lead to mental problems
M6I understand your concern. We have our own counselling service centre and activity centre. Our professional counsellors are more than happy to help each of our members. Also, social activities such as shopping and seeing movies are organised on a monthly basis.42

entry.content:

Argument


Introduction

The controversial topic with respect to __ 主题 __ never fails to attract public attention. There has been a heated debate on whether __ 论题 __ . As far as I am concerned, I tend to be an advocate/opponent (支持/反对) regarding this issue. My explanation will be illustrated in the following part of this essay.

Body (1)

正方论点: It is reasonable / evidently for me to believe that __ 论题 __ is of great importance due to the fact that __ 正方论点 __ . It can be seen that __ 现象 __ , which indicates that __ 本质 __ . As a result / Hence / Therefore, __ 重述论点 __ .

Body (2)

反方论点: In contrast, there are quite a few to hold the opinion that it is of less value to __ 反方论点 __ , (Opposite Point).

拆台: This argument does not hold water at all since / (However, this argument is not convincing because they) __ 诋毁 __ ,

吹牛: There is a finding conducted BY the researchers at the University of Oxford has figured out that __ 编数据 __ .

Conclusion

In a nutshell, I may safely reach the conclusion that __ 正方论点 __ based on the examples and results of the research.


Advantage & Disadvantage


Introduction

These days, there is an open debate on both pros and cons of __ 主题 __ . So many believe that __ 缺点 __ , while others may claim that it has some beneficial effects. From my perspective, __ 主题 __ have both positive and negative aspects, and I will explain my point of view from both sides in the following essay.

Body(1)

On one hand, __ 主题 __ are advantageous because __ 优点 __ . To be specific, __ 阐述优点 __ For example, __ 编故事__ , which makes __ 编数据 __ . As a result, the benefits of 主题 to __ 编的故事 __ is quite obvious.

Body(2)

On the other hand, those who argue against the notion claim that __ 缺点 __ . Specifically, although __ 阐述缺点 __ . For instance, __ 编故事__ . In brief, __ 主题 __ + __ 缺点 __

Conclusion

In Conclusion, since __ 主题 __ can both __ 优点 __ + __ 缺点 __ , there are both advantages and disadvantages of __ 主题 __ .
